_comment: App Update Automation — Central Configuration for Medical Notes

app.name: Medical Notes
app.description: Offline Medical Notes and Medication Log. Manage medication logs, trackers, and medical records securely in one place.

onboarding.welcomeSubtitle: Manage medication logs, health trackers, and medical records offline.
features: Track medication logs and dosage schedules offline
Record daily health indicators, symptoms, and clinical notes
Generate professional medical reports and share them instantly

pages.settingsCurrencyDescription: Change the display currency for your records and reports.
pages.settingsResetDescription: Wipe all local medical files, custom templates, and configuration settings completely.

mobile.name: Medical Notes (Mobile)
mobile.description: Medication log sheets optimized for mobile layouts.

tablet.name: Medical Notes (Tablet)
tablet.description: Comprehensive medication log and health tracker sheets optimized for tablets.

desktop.name: Medical Notes (Desktop)
desktop.description: Comprehensive medication log and health tracker sheets optimized for desktop.

pdf.shareSubject: Here is your Medical Notes file
pdf.csvShareText: Medical Notes data exported as CSV

menu.emailSubject: Here is your Medical Notes file

ios.cameraUsageDescription: Medical Notes needs access to your camera to capture medical records or prescription images.
ios.photoLibraryUsageDescription: Medical Notes needs access to your photo library to attach medical records.
ios.microphoneUsageDescription: Medical Notes needs microphone access when using the camera.
